languages.text:
Once per round, when an enemy enters melee range, or if Eo-gann ends his turn adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell in 8 cell radius.
Grants immunity to Crippled Legs

Grants immunity to Crippled Legs

languages.text:

Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Once per round, when an enemy enters Eogunn's melee range or when Eogunn ends his turn adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

Once per round, when an enemy enters Eogunn's melee range or when Eogunn ends his turn adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

languages.text:
Один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник подходит на расстояние {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаки ближнего боя{/g} Эоганна, или когда Эоганн заканчивает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в соседней клетке с противником, он телепортируется на случайную клетку в радиусе 8 клеток.
Эоганн обладает иммунитетом к эффекту {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченная нога{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник подходит на расстояние {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаки ближнего боя{/g} Эоганна, или когда Эоганн заканчивает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в соседней клетке с противником, он телепортируется на случайную клетку в радиусе 8 клеток.
Эоганн обладает иммунитетом к эффекту {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченная нога{/g}.

Один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, когда противник подходит на расстояние {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаки ближнего боя{/g} Эоганна, или когда Эоганн заканчивает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в соседней клетке с противником, он телепортируется на случайную клетку в радиусе 8 клеток.
Эоганн обладает иммунитетом к эффекту {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченная нога{/g}.

languages.text:
Una vez por {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cuando un enemigo entre en el {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}alcance de cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} de Eogunn o cuando este termine su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en una casilla adyacente a un enemigo, se teletransporta a una casilla aleatoria en un radio de 8 casillas.
Eogunn es inmune al efecto {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Una vez por {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cuando un enemigo entre en el {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}alcance de cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} de Eogunn o cuando este termine su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en una casilla adyacente a un enemigo, se teletransporta a una casilla aleatoria en un radio de 8 casillas.
Eogunn es inmune al efecto {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}.

languages.text:
Wenn ein Gegner Eogunns {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfreichweite{/g} betritt oder Eogunn seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} neben einem Gegner beendet, teleportiert er sich einmal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} auf ein zufälliges Feld in einem Radius von 8 Feldern.
Eogunn ist immun gegen den Effekt {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Verkrüppeltes Bein{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Wenn ein Gegner Eogunns {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfreichweite{/g} betritt oder Eogunn seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} neben einem Gegner beendet, teleportiert er sich einmal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} auf ein zufälliges Feld in einem Radius von 8 Feldern.
Eogunn ist immun gegen den Effekt {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Verkrüppeltes Bein{/g}.

languages.text:
Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} bir kez olmak üzere Eogunn'un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş menziline{/g} bir düşman girerse veya Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunu{/g} bir düşmanın bitişiğinde bitirirse Eogunn 8 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki rastgele bir hücreye ışınlanır.
Eogunn, {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}kötürüm bacak{/g} etkisine karşı bağışıktır.
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} bir kez olmak üzere Eogunn'un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş menziline{/g} bir düşman girerse veya Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunu{/g} bir düşmanın bitişiğinde bitirirse Eogunn 8 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki rastgele bir hücreye ışınlanır.
Eogunn, {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}kötürüm bacak{/g} etkisine karşı bağışıktır.

languages.text:
Une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, quand un ennemi se rapproche à {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}portée de mêlée{/g} d'Eogunn ou que ce dernier termine son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} sur une case adjacente à un adversaire, Eogunn se téléporte vers un emplacement aléatoire dans un rayon de 8 cases.
Il bénéficie d'une immunité contre l'effet {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
Une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, quand un ennemi se rapproche à {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}portée de mêlée{/g} d'Eogunn ou que ce dernier termine son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} sur une case adjacente à un adversaire, Eogunn se téléporte vers un emplacement aléatoire dans un rayon de 8 cases.
Il bénéficie d'une immunité contre l'effet {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}.

languages.text:
当敌人进入伊奥贡的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战范围{/g}，或伊奥贡在与敌人相邻的情况下结束{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}时，他会传送至8格范围内的一个随机格，每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}触发1次。
伊奥贡免疫{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}效果。
languages.original_text:
Once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when an enemy enters Eogunn's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g} or when Eogunn ends his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an enemy, he teleports to a random cell within an 8-cell radius.
Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
当敌人进入伊奥贡的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战范围{/g}，或伊奥贡在与敌人相邻的情况下结束{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}时，他会传送至8格范围内的一个随机格，每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}触发1次。
伊奥贡免疫{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}效果。

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}につき1回、敵がエオガンの{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接範囲{/g}に入ったとき、またはエオガンが敵に隣接した状態で{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}を終了したとき、彼は半径8マス以内のランダムなマスへテレポートする。
エオガンは{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}脚部損傷{/g}効果を受けない。

Eogunn is immune to the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

エオガンは{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}脚部損傷{/g}効果を受けない。
